title: Dense German Tamarind Toast
description: A hearty, halal-friendly breakfast toast infused with the tangy flavor of tamarind. Perfect for a drizzly monsoon morning.
instructions: Toast the bread slices in a toaster or under the broiler until lightly browned.
In a small bowl, mix together the tamarind paste and sugar until well combined.
Spread a layer of the tamarind mixture on each toasted bread slice.
Melt the butter in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the cinnamon, ginger, and black pepper to the melted butter and stir to combine.
Brush the flavored butter mixture evenly over the tamarind-coated bread slices.
Sprinkle a pinch of flaky sea salt over each bread slice.
Garnish with a handful of fresh parsley and serve immediately.
Repeat the process for the remaining bread slices.
Serve the tamarind toast warm and enjoy!
